description_long: This is a traditional hand axe featuring a long, cylindrical wooden handle with a dark, weathered finish and a wrapped grip section near the head for improved handling. The axe head is forged from metal, displaying a matte, slightly rough surface with a single broad cutting edge and a pronounced poll on the opposite side. The blade is slightly curved, with a robust, utilitarian design suitable for chopping or splitting tasks. The head is securely mounted to the handle using a classic wedged fitting, with no visible screws or bolts. The overall appearance suggests durability and functionality, with no decorative embellishments or branding visible. The color palette is dominated by natural wood brown and metallic gray, giving it a rugged, practical look.
description: A traditional hand axe with a long wooden handle, wrapped grip, and a robust metal head featuring a single cutting edge and poll. The design is utilitarian, with natural wood and metal finishes.
description_view_0: The axe is seen from the top, showing the narrow profile of the blade and the rounded end of the handle.
description_view_1: A full side view reveals the length of the wooden handle, the wrapped grip, and the broad, curved metal blade with a pronounced poll.
description_view_2: The axe is viewed from the bottom, highlighting the cylindrical handle and the back of the axe head.
description_view_3: Another side view, opposite to view 1, showing the same features from the other side, including the blade and poll.
attribute_handle_type: Long, straight cylindrical wooden handle with a wrapped leather grip section; ergonomic and traditional style.
attribute_blade_design: Single broad, slightly curved steel blade with a pronounced poll; utilitarian edge profile, no beard, no decorative features.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged fitting securing the blade to the wooden handle.
